description: Build AI Excuse Generator - a viral micro-SaaS that generates creative, believable excuses for any situation. Fun, shareable, with excuse quality ratings and categories. The kind of tool people share in group chats.
steps: Create directory viral-ai-saas/ai-excuse-generator/ with standard structure: server.js, package.json, db/, routes/, views/, public/css/, public/js/, tests/, README.md, .gitignore
Create package.json with dependencies: express, ejs, better-sqlite3, bcrypt, express-session

Create db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), excuses (id, user_id nullable, situation, category, excuse_text, believability_score, creativity_score, share_id unique, created_at)
Create db/database.js following the standard pattern
Create routes/auth.js with standard auth routes

Create routes/excuse.js with: POST /excuse/generate (accepts situation description and category like 'work', 'social', 'family', 'school', 'fitness'; generates mock AI excuse with believability and creativity scores 1-10), GET /excuse/:shareId (public shareable excuse card)

The mock excuse generator should have extensive excuse templates per category with variables. Output includes: the excuse itself, a 'delivery tips' section, a 'risk level' indicator (low/medium/high), and a believability percentage. Make them genuinely funny.
Create views/index.ejs - colorful, playful landing page with category selector cards (work, social, family, school, fitness), situation input, examples of generated excuses. Bright, fun aesthetic.

Create views/result.ejs - excuse result page with the excuse displayed prominently in a card, scores shown as badges, delivery tips section, share buttons (Twitter, WhatsApp, copy text), 'Generate Another' button
Create views/share.ejs - public shareable page showing the excuse card with fun styling, CTA to generate your own
Create views/login.ejs, views/register.ejs, views/dashboard.ejs following standard patterns
Create public/css/style.css with playful design - bright gradients, emoji accents, card-based layout, fun typography
Create public/js/app.js with category selection, form submission, share functionality, copy-to-clipboard
Create server.js following the standard pattern
Create tests/app.test.js with tests: server startup, landing page, auth flow, excuse generation (valid input, missing fields, different categories), share page, history
acceptance_criteria: Landing page renders with situation input and category selection
Generating an excuse returns text with believability and creativity scores
